verse.name: v1
verse.lines: O lord, you brought us from a mighty long way A mighty long stay in the wilderness O lord, you brought us through the thick and thin Through the fire and wind to a better place You brought us out, to bring us in

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All those years longing for a land We would start, but too weak to stand And they took their toll. Tyrants of their soul With no place we could call our own With no song, lord, you heard our groan And you made a way, where there was no way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Out of chains and the bonds of man Out of death, and the curse of sin Through the desert sand to the promise land
